title: ddl_log.log file size increased when exchange partition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id integer NOT NULL, name varchar(255) NOT NULL, created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
CREATE TABLE t3 (id integer NOT NULL, value numeric(10,2) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO t3 (id, value) VALUES (1, 123.45), (2, NULL);
SELECT t2.name, t3.value FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON t2.id = t3.id WHERE t3.value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: File size increases during exchange partition operation
